title: Belgian Signal & Catenary - Voxel Pack
body:
# 🚂 Belgian Signal & Catenary voxel pack 🚂⚫️🟡🔴 ![All Signal of the pack](https://sim-studio.net/SimNoTrains/2024-01-31_21.40.04.png)
**
🚧 WARNING: This pack is under development! 🚧
** **Pack "Belgian Signal & Catenary - Voxel Pack" made by SimNoLuc** Creation of Belgian signals and catenary of the SNCB / NMBS and Infrabel networks.
The models are chosen according to my crush and my desire. If you want to see other models or contribute to the project, contact me! You can also support me by making a donation via Paypal to the following address: contact@sim-studio.be
This mod is also a logical continuation of my pack "[Belgian Voxel Trains Pack](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-railroading-belgian-voxel-trains-pack)" that I strongly advise you to use for more realism and fun. ![view of the mod](https://sim-studio.net/SimNoTrains/2024-01-31_21.38.32.png) > ➡️ 🟢 (Green = No Redstone at all)
> ➡️ 🔴 (Red = Redstone On - West or East)
> ➡️ 🟡 (Yellow = Redstone On - North or South)
> (Screens coming soon...)
- 🔘 This mod does not require any other mod to work. - 🔘 Here is my project to make some signals, catenary and stuff from Belgium in voxel. I am very inspired by my pack "[Belgian Voxel Trains Pack](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-railroading-belgian-voxel-trains-pack)". I also recommend that you use it for more immersion. - 🔘 You can now change the signal with Redstone! You can also put the lights by hand and change them via the built-in menu. I planned to add uses with "wifi" signals but Redstone is cool and it's working fine! ![view of the mod](https://sim-studio.net/SimNoTrains/2024-01-31_21.37.19.png) _Current version: V0.9.3
Last update: 21/02/2024 (DD-MM-YYYY)_
